allow: Bash(python -c "from app.content.python_roadmap_data import PYTHON_ROADMAP_TRACKS, PYTHON_ROADMAP_LESSONS, PYTHON_ROADMAP_PROBLEMS, PYTHON_ROADMAP_PROJECTS; print\('tracks:', len\(PYTHON_ROADMAP_TRACKS\)\); print\('lesson_tracks:', list\(PYTHON_ROADMAP_LESSONS.keys\(\)\)\); print\('lesson_total:', sum\(len\(v\) for v in PYTHON_ROADMAP_LESSONS.values\(\)\)\); print\('problems:', len\(PYTHON_ROADMAP_PROBLEMS\)\); print\('projects:', len\(PYTHON_ROADMAP_PROJECTS\)\)")
